data.patch:
{
    "name": "octocode-monorepo",
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "description": "Monorepo for Octocode MCP and related packages - Model Context Protocol server for advanced GitHub repository analysis and code discovery.",
    "author": "Guy Bary <bgauryy@octocodeai.com>",
    "homepage": "https://octocode.ai",
    "repository": "bgauryy/octocode-mcp.git",
    "bugs": "https://github.com/bgauryy/octocode-mcp/issues",
    "license": "MIT",
    "type": "module",
    "engines": {
      "node": ">=20.0.0"
    },
    "scripts": {
      "build": "yarn prepublish && node ./scripts/workspace-health.mjs run build",
      "build:native:all": "yarn workspace @octocodeai/octocode-engine build:all",
      "platforms:check": "yarn workspace @octocodeai/octocode-engine platforms:check",
      "build:publish": "yarn prepublish && yarn build:native:all && yarn platforms:check && yarn workspace octocode-mcp build:publish",
      "docs:verify": "node ./scripts/docs-verify.mjs",
      "health:check": "node ./scripts/workspace-health.mjs check",
      "health:report": "node ./scripts/workspace-health.mjs report",
      "lint": "node ./scripts/workspace-health.mjs run lint",
      "lint:fix": "yarn workspaces foreach -Apt run lint:fix",
      "local:check": "node ./release/sync-packages-local.mjs",
      "local:fix": "node ./release/sync-packages-local.mjs --fix",
      "sync:version": "node ./release/sync-packages-version.mjs",
      "sync:version:publish": "node ./release/sync-packages-version.mjs --pin-for-publish",
      "deps:dedupe": "node ./scripts/dedupe-deps.mjs",
      "deps:dedupe:fix": "node ./scripts/dedupe-deps.mjs --fix",
      "test": "node ./scripts/workspace-health.mjs run test",
      "test:quiet": "yarn workspaces foreach -Apt run test:quiet",
      "typecheck": "node ./scripts/workspace-health.mjs run typecheck",
      "verify": "node ./scripts/workspace-health.mjs verify",
      "prepublish": "yarn readme:sync",
      "readme:sync": "node ./scripts/sync-package-readmes.mjs"
    },
    "devDependencies": {
      "@eslint/js": "^9.35.0",
      "eslint": "^9.18.0",
      "eslint-config-prettier": "^10.1.8",
      "eslint-plugin-prettier": "^5.5.6",
      "prettier": "^3.8.4",
      "typescript": "^5.9.3",
      "typescript-eslint": "^8.61.1"
    },
    "private": true,
    "resolutions": {
      "@octocodeai/octocode-core": "file:../octocode-mcp-host/packages/octocode-core"
    },
    "workspaces": [
      "packages/*",
      "packages/octocode-engine/npm/*"
    ]
  }
